LanguageData.RE_Gun_AllianceCompactSMG.tools.0.label: grip
LanguageData.RE_Gun_AllianceCompactSMG.tools.1.label: muzzle
LanguageData.RE_Gun_AllianceCompactSMG.label: M-12 Locust
LanguageData.RE_Gun_AllianceCompactSMG.description: The Locust is an expensive but deadly addition to anyone's personal arsenal. This fully automatic submachine gun is punishing up close, while still capable of precise fire at long range.
LanguageData.RE_Gun_AllianceRapidSniperRifle.label: M-97 Viper
LanguageData.RE_Gun_AllianceRapidSniperRifle.descript: The Viper is a semi-automatic, rapid-fire sniper rifle capable of quickly engaging targets with follow-up shots.
